exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I should have read this book.
She should not have left this job.
You should have apologized to him.
He should have told me.

exercises.audioScript: I should have saved more money.
exercises.hindiScript: मुझे ज्यादा पैसे बचाने चाहिए थे।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We should have arrived on time.
I should have practiced more.
He should have worked harder.
I should have saved more money.
exercises.answer: I should have saved more money.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You should not have made this mistake.
We should have helped him.
I should have told this earlier.
We should have thought earlier.

options: He should have told me.

exercises.audioScript: She should not have left this job.
exercises.hindiScript: उसे यह जॉब नहीं छोड़नी चाहिए थी।

options: I should have saved more money.

exercises.answer: She should not have left this job.

exercises.hindiScript: मुझे ज्यादा practice करनी चाहिए थी।

exercises.hindiScript: हमें उसकी मदद करनी चाहिए थी।

options: You should have stopped him.

exercises.audioScript: You should have expressed your point correctly.
exercises.hindiScript: तुम्हें अपनी बात सही से कहनी चाहिए थी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She should not have left this job.
You should have apologized to him.
We should have arrived on time.
You should have expressed your point correctly.
exercises.answer: You should have expressed your point correctly.

dictationPassage.text: He should have told me. I should have saved more money. We should have thought earlier. You should have stopped him. She should not have left this job.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: उसे मुझे बताना चाहिए था। मुझे ज्यादा पैसे बचाने चाहिए थे। हमें पहले सोचना चाहिए था। तुम्हें उसे रोकना चाहिए था। उसे यह जॉब नहीं छोड़नी चाहिए थी।
